hero.headline: *Quality for the price* — that's the Story
hero.subheadline: When Macon homeowners want paint that lasts and looks right, they call us. Simple as that.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Paint and remodel done right
services_section.subheading: From single rooms to whole houses — we handle it all

services.title: Interior Painting
services.description: Fresh walls that transform your space. We prep right, paint clean, and leave your home looking exactly how you pictured it.

services.title: Exterior Painting
services.description: Weather-tough coats that protect and beautify. Your home's first impression starts with paint that can handle Georgia weather.

services.title: Home Remodeling
services.description: Room updates that make sense. Whether it's kitchens, baths, or living spaces, we bring your vision to life without the headaches.

about.heading: Macon's go-to for paint and remodel work
about.body: At Storys Painting and Remodeling, we believe in doing it right the first time. Our team brings years of experience to every job, from simple paint refreshes to complete room makeovers. We're local, reliable, and committed to delivering quality work that shows.

reviews_section.label: WORD OF MOUTH
reviews_section.heading: What Macon says about our work

reviews.name: Rick R.
reviews.text: These guys really know their craft. Best quality for the price I've found in Macon.

cta.heading: Ready to see the difference quality makes?
cta.body: Get a straight quote on your paint or remodel project. No surprises, just honest work at fair prices.
